prayer:

Cycle through diagnostic purges to reaffirm the Razorback's harmonious function.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Razorback to endure in maintenance eternal.

prayer:
Kneel before the transit mag-rail and intone the Activation Doxology to awaken its latent fury.

Initiate the activation sequence, flooding conduits with sanctified plasma.
Commune with the transit mag-rail's Machine Spirit, ensuring seamless propulsion.
Verify warp-free transit as the mag-rail hums in obedient activation.

Depower the plasma capacitors sequentially, beseeching calm upon its Machine Spirit.

Invoke the Omnissiah to preserve the lance battery through shutdown repose.
